Landing.heroDesc: Weekly audits that tell you exactly what to change to increase your ROAS. In less than 15 minutes per week.
Landing.heroDescSub: Connect your account in 3 clicks. The AI does the rest.
Landing.readonly: ✨ Read-only. We never modify your ads.
Landing.painTitle: How much is it costing you not to audit your ads?
Landing.painSubtitle: Ads Manager is complex. If you don't analyze it constantly, you're losing money every day.
Landing.pain1Desc: Ghost campaigns consuming your daily balance without bringing a single client. Aditor spots them instantly.
Landing.pain2Desc: Turning off good ads by intuition or scaling the wrong ones. The AI cross-references metrics the human eye misses.
Landing.pain3Desc: Spending hours cross-referencing data in Excel is unviable. Get a ready-to-execute report in less than 3 minutes.
Landing.feat1Desc: We analyze the entire funnel: from ad CTR to conversion rate on your landing page.
Landing.feat2Desc: No confusing dashboards. We tell you "Increase 15% here" and "Pause this creative urgently".
Landing.feat3Desc: With the Pro plan, the AI reviews your account every week to ensure performance doesn't drop.
Landing.securityTitle: Your account is safe with us
Landing.securitySubtitle: Full transparency on how we handle your data.
Landing.sec1Desc: We only request the ads_read permission. We cannot modify, pause, or edit anything in your account.
Landing.sec2Desc: Encrypted connection directly with Meta. We never see or store your password.
Landing.sec3Desc: We process your metrics to generate the report and don't retain them beyond what's necessary.
Landing.sec4Desc: Your campaign data is never used to train AI models. It's exclusively yours.
Landing.profilesTitle: Built for those who live and breathe ads
Landing.profilesSubtitle: No matter your role, Aditor AI adapts to your workflow.
Landing.profile1Desc: You manage multiple accounts and don't have time to audit each one manually.
Landing.profile1Perk2: Reports ready to send to your clients
Landing.profile1Perk3: Detect issues before your client asks
Landing.profile2Desc: Your team needs a consistent quality standard across all accounts.
Landing.profile2Perk1: Multiple ad accounts in a single dashboard
Landing.profile2Perk3: Save hours of manual analysis per week
Landing.profile3Desc: You invest in Meta Ads but don't know if your agency or media buyer is optimizing well.
Landing.profile3Perk1: Unbiased second opinion on your campaigns
Landing.profile3Perk2: Understand your performance without being an ads expert
Landing.profile3Perk3: Alerts when something needs urgent attention
Landing.weeklySubtitle: Every week the AI works for you. Here's the cycle:
Landing.week1Desc: The AI scans all your active campaigns: structure, metrics, frequency, creatives, and targeting.
Landing.week2Desc: Identifies campaigns with declining ROAS, excessive frequency, spiking CPM, or exhausted creatives.
Landing.week3Desc: You receive an email with your account's overall score, critical findings, and a prioritized action plan.
Landing.week4Desc: Apply the recommendations in 15 minutes. The following week, the AI measures if the changes worked.
Landing.diffSubtitle: Aditor AI is your performance director. Here's what makes us different.
Landing.diffOthers1: Show you metrics without telling you what to do
Landing.diffOthers3: Require complex setup and long onboarding
Landing.diffOthers4: Mix creatives, copy, and analysis without clear focus
Landing.diffAditor1: Tells you exactly what to pause, scale, or change and why
Landing.diffAditor2: Technical + tactical audit focused on real ROAS
Landing.diffAditor3: Connect in 3 clicks, first report in 3 minutes
Landing.diffAditor4: Single focus: making your Meta Ads investment profitable
Landing.pricingSubtitle: A single report can save you 10 times the subscription value.
Landing.faq1Q: Does Aditor AI modify my campaigns?
Landing.faq1A: No. Aditor AI only has read access to your campaigns. It never modifies, pauses or edits any ad. It only analyzes and recommends.
Landing.faq2Q: Do I need to give my Meta Ads password?
Landing.faq2A: No. The connection is made through Meta's official OAuth 2.0, the same system used by apps like Hootsuite or Buffer. We never see your password.
Landing.faq3Q: What happens when the 7-day trial ends?
Landing.faq3A: You will receive a warning email the day before. If you don't activate your subscription, you'll lose access to the dashboard but your data is saved.
Landing.faq4Q: Does it work for any type of business?
Landing.faq4A: Yes. Aditor AI analyzes any Meta Ads account with active campaigns. It's optimized for e-commerce but works for any vertical.
Landing.faq5A: You can generate audits manually whenever you want. Also, every Monday at 9AM the AI automatically analyzes your campaigns and emails you the report.
Landing.faq6A: Yes. No permanence or penalties. You cancel from the settings panel at any time.
Landing.ctaSectionTitle: Your ROAS won't improve on its own.
Landing.ctaSectionSubtitle: The AI has already found the problems. You just need to see them.
Landing.ctaSectionMicrocopy: 7 days free · No credit card · Cancel anytime
